public class EmbedCond {
  public String f(String s) {
    boolean hard = false;
    int n;
    if (s == null || (n = s.length()) == 0) {
      return "";
    }
    if (n == 1) {
      return s.toUpperCase();
    }
    char[] c = s.toUpperCase().toCharArray();
    StringBuilder a = new StringBuilder(40);
    StringBuilder b = new StringBuilder(10);
    a.append(c);
    return b.append(a).toString();
  }
}
